name: Scotcheroos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine sugar and corn syrup. Heat just until bubbly.
2. Remove from heat and stir in peanut butter. Stir until well blended.
3. Gently stir in the cereal. Lightly press mixture into a buttered 9 x 13 pan.
4. In a double boiler or microwave oven, melt chocolate and butterscotch chips.
5. Immediately spread over bars in the pan.
6. Refrigerate just until chocolate sets and hardens slightly.
7. Cut into squares.
Makes 3 to 4 dozen bars.
